brief: Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push 5% rewards on travel bookings via Kotak Unbox. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, polished, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push low 2% forex markup for frequent international travellers. Premium, direct-to-camera, conversion-led.

Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Create urgency around unlocking a complimentary flight after one and a half lakh quarterly spend. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push annual travel privileges worth over Rs. 80,000. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, polished, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Push zero joining fee for a limited period. Premium frequent traveller, direct-to-camera, BOFU and conversion-led.
Need an 8 second MOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight complimentary domestic lounge access for frequent flyers. Premium, direct-to-camera, polished and benefit-led.
Need an 8 second MOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight complimentary international lounge access with Priority Pass support. Premium global traveller, direct-to-camera, polished.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight the welcome benefit of 2,500 Air Miles after card issuance. Premium traveller, direct-to-camera, polished.
Need an 8 second CRM-style Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight the annual renewal benefit of 2,500 Air Miles on fee payment. Premium traveller, direct-to-camera.
Need an 8 second utility-led Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight the 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends. Direct-to-camera, practical but premium.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight that Air Miles can transfer to airline and hotel loyalty partners. Premium traveller, direct-to-camera.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight that one Air Mile equals one rupee on Kotak Unbox flight and hotel redemptions. Premium traveller, direct-to-camera.
Need an 8 second MOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Highlight earning 5 Air Miles per Rs. 100 on travel bookings through Kotak Unbox. Premium traveller, direct-to-camera.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Combine annual travel savings worth over Rs. 80,000 with low 2% forex markup. Premium international traveller, direct-to-camera.

Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Air Plus credit card. Speak to salaried or self-employed frequent travellers in metro cities who want a premium travel card with practical value. Direct-to-camera, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Push 5% cashback on online grocery spends for metro salaried users. Direct-to-camera, practical, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Push 5% cashback on food delivery for savings-oriented metro spenders. Direct-to-camera, practical and conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Push 5% cashback on online entertainment and OTT. Direct-to-camera, practical, digitally native.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Position it as the everyday savings card for groceries, food delivery and OTT spends. Direct-to-camera, practical, conversion-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Push up to 4% fuel benefits for commuters in metro cities. Direct-to-camera, practical and savings-led.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Push a limited-period zero joining fee style onboarding message. Direct-to-camera, practical and conversion-led.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Highlight 0.5% cashback on other eligible spends. Direct-to-camera, practical.
Need an 8 second entertainment-led Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Highlight the PVR INOX Buy 1 Get 1 movie benefit. Direct-to-camera, practical and youth-urban.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Highlight annual fee waiver on annual retail spends of 2 lakh. Direct-to-camera, practical and conversion-led.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Clarify that accelerated cashback is capped at 750 points per billing cycle. Direct-to-camera, clear and practical.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Highlight that one reward point equals one rupee and can be redeemed as cashback against statement outstanding. Direct-to-camera.
Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Highlight 0.5% cashback on UPI on credit card spends for the RuPay variant. Direct-to-camera, practical and digital.

Need an 8 second utility Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Clarify that cashback applies on online grocery, food delivery and entertainment, not on everything. Direct-to-camera and practical.
Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Combine 5% cashback on online grocery with up to 4% fuel benefits for practical metro users. Direct-to-camera.

Need an 8 second BOFU Meta reel for Kotak Cashback+ credit card. Position it as a practical way to unlock over ten thousand rupees in annual value for disciplined monthly spenders. Direct-to-camera, practical and conversion-led.
